title: abies pinsapo var. hispanica
intro: Abies pinsapo var. hispanica, also known as Spanish fir, is a variety of the Mediterranean fir tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. This evergreen conifer has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The health benefits of Abies pinsapo var. hispanica include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as a natural antiseptic to combat infections. Abies pinsapo var. hispanica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, essential oil, and tincture, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
